Package microui.core.effect

Class ReactiveShadow

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
microui.core.effect.ReactiveShadow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
public class ReactiveShadow extends AbstractShadow
A reactive shadow effect that dynamically adjusts its intensity based on mouse position. Creates an interactive shadow that responds to mouse movement, with shadow weights calculated relative to the mouse's position relative to the target component.

The ReactiveShadow creates a gradient shadow effect where each side's intensity is determined by the mouse's proximity to that side of the target component. The shadow dynamically updates as the mouse moves, creating an interactive visual feedback effect.

See Also:

  • ContentView

  • Constructor Details

    • ReactiveShadow

      public ReactiveShadow()
      Constructs a ReactiveShadow with default properties. Initializes with all weights cleared and a semi-transparent black color.

    • ReactiveShadow

      public ReactiveShadow(ContentView target)
      Constructs a ReactiveShadow with a specified target ContentView.
      Parameters:
      target - the ContentView to apply the reactive shadow to

  • Method Details

    • requestUpdateWeights

      public void requestUpdateWeights()
      Requests an immediate update of shadow weights based on current mouse position. Useful for forcing a weight recalculation when needed.
